title: Requesting ability to upload custom font colors/hex codes
excerpt: Please allow users to upload custom hex codes to use for font colors and column colors that match their branding

posts.author: raffermo (Molly Rafferty)
posts.cookedHtml: Please allow users to upload custom hex codes to use for font colors and column colors that match their branding

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

posts.author: Scarletioshub (Scarletioshub)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow users to input custom hex codes for font and column colors through a color picker or manual input field. Save these preferences to apply custom colors to their branding, ensuring a personalized experience.
